mapper.sql: id, name, description, icon, parent_id, sort_order, status, is_builtin, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories (name, description, icon, parent_id, sort_order, status, is_builtin, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{icon}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{isBuiltin}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM categories WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM categories WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM apps WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, icon = #{icon}, parent_id = #{parentId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE categories SET deleted_at = NOW(3), updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
